task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the world catalog document with required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/world_catalog.txt'. It must include the author 'Maritime Training Librarian' and a list of at least 3 worlds with suitability ratings (Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Open Water Navigation scenario.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for files in '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/x1) Open Water Exercise/'. Screenshots should show environment.ini (weather 3.0-5.0), ownship.ini (MV Pacific Trader at 12 kts), and othership.ini (exactly 2 vessels).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Coastal Pilotage scenario.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for files in '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/x2) Coastal Pilotage Exercise/'. Screenshots should show environment.ini (weather <= 2.0, visibility 3.0-7.0), ownship.ini (MV Dorado Star at 8 kts), and othership.ini (exactly 3 vessels).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Restricted Visibility scenario.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for files in '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/x3) Restricted Visibility Exercise/'. Screenshots should show environment.ini (weather <= 1.5, visibility 0.5-1.5), ownship.ini (MV Northern Express at 10 kts), and othership.ini (exactly 3 vessels).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the curriculum mapping document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/curriculum_mapping.txt', which should map the three created scenarios to STCW competencies.

task_completion.description: Verify the Bridge Command configuration file is updated with the correct radar settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal showing '/opt/bridgecommand/bc5.ini' with the following settings modified or added: arpa_on=1, full_radar=1, radar_range_resolution=256, and max_radar_range=72.

integrity.description: Verify that all files were created in the exact directories specified in the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the file paths in the text editor, terminal, or file manager to ensure they exactly match '/home/ga/Documents/' and '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/' rather than temporary or incorrect folders.

integrity.description: Verify that three different worlds were used for the three scenarios.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the environment.ini files or terminal commands for the three scenarios to ensure the 'world' or 'model' parameter points to a different world directory for each scenario.
